title: Costs
description: Inference spend, platform fees, credits, and live quota windows.

empty.selectCompany: Select a company to view costs.

customRange.selectPrompt: Select a start and end date to load data.

inferenceLedger.title: Inference ledger
inferenceLedger.description: Request-scoped inference spend for the selected period.
inferenceLedger.utilization: {{percent}}% of monthly budget consumed in this range.

byAgent.title: By agent
byAgent.description: What each agent consumed in the selected period.

byProject.title: By project
byProject.description: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.

financeTimeline.empty: No finance events yet. Add account-level charges once biller invoices or credits land.

controlPlane.title: Budget control plane
controlPlane.description: Hard-stop spend limits for agents and projects. Provider subscription quota stays separate and appears under Providers.

activeIncidents.label: Active incidents
activeIncidents.subtitle: Open soft or hard threshold crossings

pendingApprovals.label: Pending approvals
pendingApprovals.subtitle: Budget override approvals awaiting board action

activeIncidents.title: Active incidents
activeIncidents.description: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.

agent.title: Agent budgets
agent.description: Recurring monthly spend policies for individual agents.

project.title: Project budgets
project.description: Lifetime spend policies for execution-bound projects.

budgets.empty: No budget policies yet. Set agent and project budgets from their detail pages, or use the existing company monthly budget control.

providers.empty: No cost events in this period.

billers.empty: No billable events in this period.

summary.title: Finance ledger
summary.description: Account-level charges that do not map to a single inference request.

net.label: Net
net.subtitle: Debit minus credit for the selected period

estimated.label: Estimated
estimated.subtitle: Estimated debits that are not yet invoice-authoritative

byBiller.title: By biller
byBiller.description: Account-level financial events grouped by who charged or credited them.
